description: The normalized total cost of a quotation laid down at the buyer's door, computed by the system per quote so that quotes (which differ on incoterm, freight, duty, and charges) compare on one apples-to-apples figure (SCOR S1.9). Formula (Al Bahja, with insurance and demurrage added after review): quote + freight + insurance + duty - exemption + local POD + local POL + customs clearance + demurrage/storage + miscellaneous + documentation. Insurance is the I in CIF. Damage is tracked SEPARATELY and never folded into the comparison number. Actual charges are entered at invoice time; any missing value falls back to the average of that charge from past orders so a comparison is never blocked. The landed total is FX-normalized to base for cross-currency ranking.

fields.name: landedCostId
fields.label: Landed Cost No.
fields.purpose: Stable key for one quote's landed-cost breakdown so the comparison and any later actual-vs-estimate reconciliation attach to a specific quotation.

fields.name: quotationId
fields.label: Quotation
fields.validation: the quote this landed cost normalizes; one landed cost per quotation; immutable link
fields.purpose: Binds the landed-cost breakdown to its quotation so ranking can sort suppliers on a comparable laid-down cost rather than on raw quoted price.

fields.name: quote
fields.label: Quote Price
fields.validation: = Quotation.price (the headline quoted amount); quote currency; the base of the landed-cost build-up
fields.purpose: The starting figure of the build-up: the supplier's quoted price before any logistics, duty, or charges are added.

fields.name: freight
fields.label: Freight
fields.validation: >= 0; entered at invoice time; missing value falls back to the past-order average for this charge (averaging fallback)
fields.purpose: The transport cost the buyer bears (depends on incoterm); added to the build-up so an EXW quote with high freight compares fairly against a CIF quote that already includes carriage.

fields.name: insurance
fields.label: Insurance
fields.validation: >= 0; the I in CIF; averaging fallback when missing
fields.purpose: Marine/transit insurance cost; added after review because it is the I in CIF and materially changes the laid-down cost of a non-CIF quote the buyer must insure itself.

fields.name: duty
fields.label: Customs Duty
fields.validation: >= 0; import duty/VAT on the consignment; averaging fallback when missing
fields.purpose: Import duty (and VAT/Bayan in AB practice) added to the build-up so the true cost of an import quote includes the tax the buyer pays at the border.

fields.name: exemption
fields.label: Duty Exemption
fields.validation: >= 0; SUBTRACTED in the formula; a duty concession/exemption the buyer qualifies for
fields.purpose: Any duty relief the buyer is entitled to; the one negative term in the formula so the landed cost reflects net duty actually payable, not gross.

fields.name: localPOD
fields.label: Local Charges at POD
fields.validation: >= 0; local handling at the port/place of destination; averaging fallback when missing
fields.purpose: Destination-side local handling charges added to the build-up so post-arrival costs at the receiving port/place are captured in the comparison.

fields.name: localPOL
fields.label: Local Charges at POL
fields.validation: >= 0; local handling at the port/place of loading; averaging fallback when missing
fields.purpose: Origin-side local handling charges added to the build-up so loading-port costs the buyer bears (under an incoterm like FCA/FOB) are in the comparison.

fields.name: customsClearance
fields.label: Customs Clearance
fields.validation: >= 0; CHA/agency clearance fees; averaging fallback when missing
fields.purpose: Customs broker/clearing-agent fees added to the build-up so the cost of getting the consignment through customs is reflected in the laid-down cost.

fields.name: demurrage
fields.label: Demurrage / Storage
fields.validation: >= 0; port storage/detention; averaging fallback when missing
fields.purpose: Port storage and detention charges; added after review because delayed clearance adds real cost that should sit in the landed comparison, not be discovered later.

fields.name: misc
fields.label: Miscellaneous
fields.validation: >= 0; catch-all including health/normal inspection, detention, artwork, die/cylinder, sample, bank charges; averaging fallback when missing
fields.purpose: The catch-all bucket for assorted always-present AB charges (inspection, bank, sample, artwork, tooling) so the build-up stays complete without a field per minor charge.

fields.name: documentation
fields.label: Documentation
fields.validation: >= 0; export/shipping document costs (seeds from Quotation.documentationCharges); averaging fallback when missing
fields.purpose: Documentation cost component of the build-up; carries the supplier's quoted documentation charge plus any buyer-side document fees into the laid-down cost.

fields.name: damage
fields.label: Damage (tracked separately)
fields.validation: >= 0; recorded but EXCLUDED from landedTotal and from the comparison number (hard rule); informs the four-factor perfect-order/damage-free metric
fields.purpose: Captures damage cost for the record and for the damage-free factor of the perfect-order metric (axiom A14) WITHOUT distorting the supplier comparison; deliberately never folded into landedTotal.

fields.name: averagingFallbackUsed
fields.label: Averaging Fallback Used
fields.validation: list of charge names whose value was substituted from the past-order average because no actual was available
fields.computedFormula: set of components defaulted to past-order average
fields.purpose: Records which components were estimated via the averaging fallback so the buyer knows which parts of the landed total are provisional and a comparison is never blocked by a missing charge.

fields.name: landedTotal
fields.label: Landed Total
fields.validation: quote + freight + insurance + duty - exemption + localPOD + localPOL + customsClearance + demurrage + misc + documentation; EXCLUDES damage; quote currency
fields.computedFormula: quote + freight + insurance + duty - exemption + localPOD + localPOL + customsClearance + demurrage + misc + documentation
fields.purpose: The single laid-down-cost figure (per the AB formula) that ranking sorts suppliers on; recomputed whenever a component changes. Damage is excluded by rule so it never distorts the comparison.

fields.name: landedTotalInBase
fields.label: Landed Total (Base Currency)
fields.validation: FX-converted from the quote currency; graceful degradation to landedTotal on FX failure (axiom A12)
fields.purpose: The normalized laid-down cost in base currency so quotes in different currencies rank on one comparable figure; the single number cross-currency ranking and savings reporting use (axiom A12).

invariants: A12 landedTotalInBase is FX-normalized and FX conversion never throws (degrades to landedTotal)
A13 each compute/recompute is audited and broadcast
A14 damage feeds the four-factor perfect-order metric but is excluded from landedTotal
landed cost formula is quote + freight + insurance + duty - exemption + localPOD + localPOL + customsClearance + demurrage + misc + documentation; damage tracked separately
missing components fall back to the past-order average so a comparison is never blocked
